# $prereqN variables in recipes
mk -n -f mkfile
cmp stdout expected

-- mkfile --

<./deps

test3.mk.o: $deps
	secondprocess $prereq2 $prereq1

one:
	process bar $extracmdarg

two:
	$extracmdarg rebar
-- deps --
deps = one two
extracmdarg = gopher
-- expected --
two: gopher rebar
one: process bar gopher
test3.mk.o: secondprocess two one
